feats.name: Weapon Finesse
feats.shortDesc: Use DEX modifier instead of STR on attack rolls with light weapons and rapier.
feats.fullDesc: With a light weapon, rapier, whip, or spiked chain made for a creature of your size, you may use your Dexterity modifier instead of your Strength modifier on attack rolls. This is why Shotrix's rapier and dagger both use +7 (BAB 3 + DEX 4).

feats.name: Combat Casting
feats.shortDesc: +4 on concentration checks when casting defensively or while grappled.
feats.fullDesc: You get a +4 bonus on concentration checks made to cast a spell or use a spell-like ability when casting on the defensive or while grappled. Combined with Spell Combat, Shotrix's concentration bonus is +10 (+4 INT + 4 level + 4 this feat vs. defensively).

feats.name: Lamashtu's Mark
feats.shortDesc: 1/day on a melee hit against a nonevil foe: target's CHA reduced by 1d4 for 1 hour (Fort DC 10+level+CHA mod negates).
feats.fullDesc: Your abdomen bears ugly scars marking you as Lamashtu's favored. If visible, you gain +2 Intimidate but -2 Diplomacy. Once per day as a free action when striking a nonevil foe in melee, the target is temporarily deformed, reducing CHA by 1d4 for 1 hour. Fortitude DC (10 + character level + CHA modifier) negates.

feats.name: Burning Spell (Metamagic)
feats.shortDesc: Acid/fire spells deal additional damage equal to 2× spell level at the start of the target's next turn.
feats.fullDesc: When a creature takes acid or fire damage from the affected spell, that creature takes damage equal to 2× the spell's actual level at the start of its next turn. A burning spell uses a slot two levels higher. If a spell has both acid and fire descriptors, the caster chooses which type the burning damage is.

feats.name: Craft Wondrous Item
feats.shortDesc: Can create wondrous magic items. Costs half the base price in raw materials.
feats.fullDesc: You can create a wide variety of magic wondrous items. Crafting takes 1 day for each 1,000 gp in price, consuming raw materials costing half the base price. You can also mend a broken wondrous item you could make, at half the materials and time.

classAbilities.name: Arcane Pool (6 pts/day)
classAbilities.description: Spend 1 point as a swift action to grant a held weapon +1 enhancement bonus for 1 minute. Bonuses stack up to +5. Also: Spell Recall — spend points equal to spell level to re-prepare a cast spell as a swift action.

classAbilities.name: Spell Combat
classAbilities.description: As a full-round action, make all melee weapon attacks at −2 and cast one Magus spell (casting time 1 standard action). Can cast defensively by adding up to INT bonus as a circumstance bonus to concentration and as additional penalty to attacks.

classAbilities.name: Spellstrike
classAbilities.description: When casting a touch spell from the Magus list, deliver it through your weapon as a free melee attack at highest BAB (instead of the normal free touch attack). On a hit, deals weapon damage + spell effects. Uses weapon's critical range but spell only crits at ×2.

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.description: You fire a small orb of acid at the target as a ranged touch attack, dealing 1d3 points of acid damage.

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.description: You detect magical auras within a 60-foot cone.

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.description: A ray of freezing air and ice deals 1d3 points of cold damage on a successful ranged touch attack.

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.description: A cone of searing flame deals 4d4 points of fire damage to all creatures in the area.

spells.name: Chill Touch
spells.description: A touch from your hand deals 1d6 damage to living creatures and 1 point of STR damage (Fort negates STR). Ideal for Spellstrike delivery.

spells.name: Frostbite
spells.description: Target takes 1d6+4 nonlethal cold damage and is fatigued. Can touch up to 4 creatures (one charge per creature). Ideal for Spellstrike.

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.description: 2 missiles each deal 1d4+1 force damage automatically (no attack roll needed).

spells.name: Shield
spells.description: Creates an invisible shield of force that gives +4 shield bonus to AC and negates magic missile attacks. (Toggle the 'Shield' buff above to track AC change.)

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.description: Melee touch attack deals 4d6 electricity damage. +3 bonus on the attack roll if the target is wearing metal armor. Ideal for Spellstrike.

spells.name: True Strike
spells.description: You gain a +20 insight bonus on your next single attack roll. Additionally, you are not affected by the miss chance that applies to attacks against a concealed target.

spells.name: Aggressive Thundercloud
spells.description: A 5-ft.-diameter flying storm cloud deals 3d6 electricity damage to any creature it moves over. You can direct the cloud as a move action.

spells.name: Flaming Sphere
spells.description: A 5-ft.-diameter burning globe rolls in whichever direction you point. Any creature it strikes takes 2d6 fire damage (Reflex DC 16 negates). You can move it 30 ft. per round as a move action.
